# confront [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Loop

## Purpose

Usage: hotam confront <text> [--domain <path>] [--file <path>] [--json]. CONFRONT step of the mediation loop (internal/diagnose): checks a candidate claim for lexical overlap with SETTLED requirements (duplicate guard) and REJECTED history (anti-relitigation) before anything is written. <text> is a quoted positional; --file <path> reads a long draft. Reuses the inspect overlap engine. Never gates; exit code always 0.
